skill.name: theme-factory
skill.description: Apply curated color palettes and font pairings to slides, documents, reports, and HTML artifacts. Includes ten preset themes and guidance for creating custom themes.
skill.summary: Style artifacts with curated presentation themes and custom visual directions.
skill.author: ComposioHQ

security_audit.summary: Static analysis reported network, command execution, weak cryptography, and C2 indicators. Review found these are false positives from Apache license URLs, Markdown inline code, normal prose, and color hex values; no executable code, network behavior, data access, or prompt injection was found.

low_findings.title: False Positive: Markdown Inline Code Classified as Shell Execution
low_findings.description: Theme files and SKILL.md use backticks only to format file names and color hex codes in Markdown. No Ruby, shell, subprocess, or dynamic command execution is present at these locations.
low_findings.confidence_reasoning: Every reported location is static Markdown text, not executable Ruby or shell syntax. The surrounding context is theme documentation and palette values.

low_findings.title: False Positive: Weak Cryptography Pattern in Prose
low_findings.description: The weak-cryptography alerts are substring matches inside Apache license text, SKILL.md prose, theme names, and usage descriptions. No cryptographic primitive, hashing function, encryption call, or credential handling appears in these files.
low_findings.confidence_reasoning: The reviewed lines contain legal text, ordinary design descriptions, and theme labels. They do not contain cryptographic code or configuration.

low_findings.title: False Positive: Apache License URLs Classified as Network Behavior
low_findings.description: The hardcoded URLs are standard Apache License references. They are not used by code and do not create an outbound request, callback, download, or data exfiltration path.
low_findings.confidence_reasoning: Both URLs are inside the license document. There is no code that reads or invokes them.

low_findings.title: False Positive: C2 Keyword Match in Color Hex Code
low_findings.description: The C2 alert at the Midnight Galaxy theme is a color palette line for Lavender with a hex value ending in c2. It is not a command-and-control address, protocol, or indicator of network intent.
low_findings.confidence_reasoning: The location is a documented color swatch. No network destination, encoded payload, or remote-control behavior appears nearby.

content.value_statement: Unstyled artifacts can look inconsistent and require manual design choices. This skill provides ready-made themes and a process for applying colors and fonts consistently.
actual_capabilities: Shows a theme showcase PDF for visual selection.
Provides ten preset themes with named color palettes.
Lists font pairings for headers and body text.
Guides theme application across slides, documents, reports, and HTML artifacts.
Supports custom theme creation when presets do not match the artifact.
limitations: Does not include executable styling scripts or automation code.
Does not validate font availability on the user system.
Does not guarantee brand compliance without user-provided brand rules.
Requires the assistant to edit the target artifact using available tools.

use_cases.title: Polish a Client Presentation
use_cases.description: Apply a cohesive palette and font pairing to make a slide deck look professional before delivery.

use_cases.title: Create Consistent Internal Reports
use_cases.description: Use repeatable themes so recurring reports share a stable visual identity and readable contrast.

use_cases.title: Style a Landing Page Draft
use_cases.description: Choose a preset theme or create a custom one for an HTML artifact that needs visual direction.

prompt_templates.title: Choose a Preset Theme
prompt_templates.prompt: Show me the available Theme Factory themes, then help me choose one for this presentation.

prompt_templates.title: Apply a Selected Theme
prompt_templates.prompt: Apply the Ocean Depths theme to my slide deck and keep the styling consistent across every slide.

prompt_templates.title: Match a Business Context
prompt_templates.prompt: Recommend a Theme Factory preset for a financial report, explain the fit, then apply it after I approve.

prompt_templates.title: Create a Custom Theme
prompt_templates.prompt: Create a custom theme for a premium healthcare product using calm colors, strong contrast, and readable font pairings.

output_examples.input: Apply a professional theme to a consulting slide deck.
output_examples.output: A refined deck using the Ocean Depths palette, consistent heading fonts, clear body text, and readable contrast.

output_examples.input: Create a custom theme for an elegant boutique proposal.
output_examples.output: A named theme with soft primary colors, a darker contrast color, header and body font choices, and usage guidance.
A bold visual treatment using the Tech Innovation palette with consistent accents, backgrounds, and typography.

best_practices: Review the showcase before applying a theme to a finished artifact.
Confirm the selected theme with the user before changing the artifact.
Check contrast and readability after colors and fonts are applied.
anti_patterns: Do not mix multiple preset themes in the same artifact without a clear reason.
Do not apply colors blindly when the artifact has strict brand rules.
Do not skip user approval when creating a custom theme.

faq.question: What does Theme Factory do?
faq.answer: It helps apply curated color palettes and font pairings to slides, documents, reports, and HTML artifacts.

faq.question: How many preset themes are included?
faq.answer: The skill includes ten preset themes, each with colors, font pairings, and suggested use cases.

faq.question: Can it create a custom theme?
faq.answer: Yes. It can generate a new theme from user-provided direction when the presets do not fit.

faq.question: Does it edit files automatically?
faq.answer: No. It provides design guidance that the assistant applies through the tools available in the current workspace.

faq.question: Is this useful for Claude Code and Codex?
faq.answer: Yes. Claude, Codex, and Claude Code can use the theme guidance when editing supported artifacts.

faq.question: Does the skill require network access?
faq.answer: No. The reviewed files contain local Markdown theme specifications and a local showcase PDF.
